basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Bhilai is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow for the above project.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Should not exceed 28 years (relaxation for outstanding candidates) | salary: ₹37,000 + 18% HRA per month
qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech and M.E/M.Tech in ECE/CSE/IT or relevant specializations with minimum 60% marks (or CGPA 6.5/10) with GATE/NET

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must apply using the attached application form along with resume and send it by email to the PI: [email protected] by 26 July 2026.
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview. Positions are available immediately.
Contact: Dr. Hathiram Nenavath Email: [email protected] Phone: +91-9000747143
important_instructions: The selected candidate will have to join immediately. Mere eligibility does not guarantee call for interview. The fellowship may be terminated with 30-day notice if performance is unsatisfactory. Applications with incomplete information will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai invites applications from Indian nationals for the post of Project Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in the I-DAPT-Hub Foundation-IIT BHU Varanasi funded research project. Project Title: Design and Development of a Real-Time IP Core for an Early Landslide Prediction System for Hilly Areas. Principal Investigator: Dr. Hathiram Nenavath, Assistant Professor, Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, IIT Bhilai. Co-Investigator: Dr. Ajay Pratap, Assistant Professor, Department of Computer Science and Engineering, IIT (BHU) Varanasi. Download IIT Bhilai JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Bhilai is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow for the above project.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_bhilai: Design and Development of a Real-Time IP Core for an Early Landslide Prediction System for Hilly Areas
Initial 12 months, extendable based on performance

rows.details: B.E/B.Tech and M.E/M.Tech in ECE/CSE/IT or relevant specializations with minimum 60% marks (or CGPA 6.5/10) with GATE/NET
Knowledge in Image Processing, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, FPGA Image Processing, Python programming, and scientific writing skills
Should not exceed 28 years (relaxation for outstanding candidates)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Bhilai JRF 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates must apply using the attached application form along with resume and send it by email to the PI: [email protected] by 26 July 2026. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview. Positions are available immediately. Contact: Dr. Hathiram Nenavath Email: [email protected] Phone: +91-9000747143

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The selected candidate will have to join immediately. Mere eligibility does not guarantee call for interview. The fellowship may be terminated with 30-day notice if performance is unsatisfactory. Applications with incomplete information will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Bhilai JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 26 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF positions are available at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: 01 position of Project Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for JRF at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: ₹37,000 + 18% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for IIT Bhilai Landslide Prediction Project?
faq.answer: B.E/B.Tech + M.E/M.Tech in ECE/CSE/IT or relevant fields with minimum 60% marks and GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Bhilai Project JRF position?
faq.answer: Send the duly completed application form along with resume to [email protected] by 26 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IIT Bhilai JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Should not exceed 28 years on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q7. What skills are desirable for IIT Bhilai JRF?
faq.answer: Image Processing, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, FPGA, Python programming, and scientific writing skills.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for IIT Bhilai JRF position?
faq.answer: Design and Development of a Real-Time IP Core for an Early Landslide Prediction System for Hilly Areas.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the JRF appointment at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: Initial 12 months, extendable based on performance.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any interview for selection in IIT Bhilai JRF?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview.
